text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, July 12. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning for future education costs. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Refinancing is a great leverage point. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
